title: 谋杀启事
summary:
Reverend Julian Harmon and his wife, Roundy, discuss local news, including Roundy's observation that a resident named Mr. Bartlett has begun attending church specifically to hear Julian preach due to his Oxford education. As Roundy departs, she sings a song about murder being on the scene.

In a courtyard, Miss Blacklock eats breakfast with Julia Simmons, Patrick Simmons, and her friend Miss Dora Bunner. The meal is interrupted when Miss Bunner discovers an unusual notice in the newspaper. Miss Blacklock reads the advertisement aloud, which states: "A murder will take place at Little Park on Friday, October 29th at 6:30 p.m." Miss Blacklock initially suspects Patrick of playing a prank, but he denies it, grimly joking that the "murder" might actually refer to the "Death of Delight," a special cake made by Micky. While Miss Bunner is distressed by the perceived cruelty of the notice, Miss Blacklock dismisses it as a tasteless joke, though she expresses interest in finding the culprit.

Later, Miss Blacklock reflects on her relationship with Miss Bunner. The two were school friends, but Miss Bunner’s life became difficult, leaving her in financial distress and poor health. Six months prior, Miss Blacklock brought Miss Bunner to live at the house to help manage the household. Although Miss Bunner is loyal, Miss Blacklock finds her unreliable, muddled, and often irritating due to her incompetence. As Miss Bunner expresses anxiety over the advertisement, Miss Blacklock views her as a lovable but over-sensitive and intuitive old fool.
